calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: GAP-5 H_pos / zone_coverage telemetry substrate validation
items.notes: infant_substrate:GAP-5 substrate-readiness diagnostic (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[]). C0 ARM_0 inert + layout bit-identical, C1 ARM_1 pos_entropy under ln(window) ceiling, C2 ARM_1 stub zone_coverage monotone, C3 ARM_2 GAP-2 zone_coverage keys/range, C4 ARM_1 window-cap recompute match. Unblocks DEV-NEED-001 / DEV-NEED-008. Plan-of-record: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/infant_substrate_plan.md GAP-5.
